features.title: Login screen
features.description:
Mobile login screen for user authentication.

Screen:
- Email text field (keyboard type: email)
- Password text field (obscured, toggle visibility)
- 'Se connecter' button
- 'Mot de passe oublié ?' link → forgot password screen
- Horoazhon branding at top (logo + name)

API:
- POST /api/auth/login with email + password
- On success: store JWT in flutter_secure_storage, navigate to role-appropriate dashboard
- On error: show inline error message ('Identifiants invalides')

Role routing after login:
- SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN_AGENCY, AGENT → Admin dashboard
- CLIENT → Client dashboard

Edge cases:
- Empty fields: show validation error before API call
- Network error: show 'Erreur de connexion au serveur'
- Already authenticated: redirect to dashboard

features.title: Logout
features.description:
Logout functionality accessible from profile/settings.

Behavior:
- Clear JWT token from flutter_secure_storage
- Clear all Provider state (user info, cached data)
- Navigate to login screen, clearing navigation stack
- Confirmation dialog before logout: 'Voulez-vous vous déconnecter ?'

Accessible from:
- Profile screen (logout button)
- Drawer/navigation menu

features.title: Account activation screen
features.description:
Screen for activating a new account using the activation token.

Entry point:
- Deep link: horoazhon://activate?token=xxx
- Or manual token entry screen accessible from login

Screen:
- Token field (pre-filled from deep link if available)
- New password field (obscured, toggle visibility)
- Confirm password field
- 'Activer mon compte' button

API flow:
1. GET /api/auth/activation-status?token=xxx → verify token validity
2. If invalid/expired: show error 'Lien d\'activation invalide ou expiré'
3. POST /api/auth/activate with token + password
4. On success: show success message, navigate to login

Validation:
- Password minimum length
- Password confirmation must match
- Token must be valid before showing form

features.title: Password reset flow (forgot + reset screens)
features.description:
Two-screen flow for password reset.

Screen 1 — Forgot password:
- Email field
- 'Envoyer le lien' button
- POST /api/auth/forgot-password with email
- On success: show confirmation 'Un email de réinitialisation a été envoyé'
- On error (email not found): show error message
- Back link to login

Screen 2 — Reset password:
- Entry via deep link: horoazhon://reset-password?token=xxx
- Token field (pre-filled from deep link)
- New password field
- Confirm password field
- 'Réinitialiser' button

API flow:
1. GET /api/auth/reset-status?token=xxx → verify token
2. POST /api/auth/reset-password with token + password
3. On success: navigate to login with success message

Validation:
- Email format validation
- Password confirmation match
- Token validity check before showing reset form

features.title: Home screen
features.description:
Landing screen of the app — showcases featured properties and quick access to browsing.

Sections:
- Hero area: Horoazhon branding, tagline 'Gestion immobilière simplifiée'
- Search bar: quick property search (navigates to property list with filter)
- Featured properties: horizontal scrollable list of recent properties from GET /api/biens?size=6
- Agency showcase: horizontal scrollable list from GET /api/agences
- Quick action cards: 'Voir les biens', 'Voir les agences'

Navigation:
- Tap property card → property detail
- Tap agency card → agency profile
- Tap 'Voir les biens' → property list
- Tap 'Voir les agences' → agency list

Public screen — no authentication required.

features.title: Property listing and detail screens
features.description:
Two screens for public property browsing.

Screen 1 — Property list:
- GET /api/biens with pagination (infinite scroll or load more button)
- Filter bar: ville, type (dropdown), price range, forSale/forRent toggle
- Property cards: photo (or placeholder), type badge (Vente/Location), price, ville, superficie
- Pull-to-refresh
- Empty state: 'Aucun bien trouvé' with clear filters button
- Shimmer loading placeholders while fetching

Screen 2 — Property detail:
- GET /api/biens/{id} (returns BienDetailDTO)
- Photo carousel (carousel_slider) with cached_network_image
- Property info: type, ville, code postal, superficie, eco score, description
- Price section: sale price and/or monthly rent
- Characteristics list (from caracteristiques array)
- Proximity places (from lieux array with minutes + locomotion type)
- Owner info (if any)
- Agency card with link to agency profile
- Contact button (launches phone/email via url_launcher)

Public screens — no authentication required.

features.title: Agency listing and profile screens
features.description:
Two screens for public agency browsing.

Screen 1 — Agency list:
- GET /api/agences (all agencies)
- Agency cards: logo (or placeholder), nom, ville, telephone, email
- Search/filter by name or ville
- Pull-to-refresh

Screen 2 — Agency profile:
- GET /api/agences/{id} for agency info
- GET /api/agences/{id}/biens for agency properties (paginated)
- Agency header: logo, nom, description
- Contact info: adresse, telephone, email, SIRET, TVA
- Properties tab: scrollable list of agency's properties
- Tap property → property detail screen
- Contact buttons: call (tel:), email (mailto:) via url_launcher

Public screens — no authentication required.

features.title: App navigation and layout
features.description:
Core navigation structure adapted for mobile.

Bottom navigation bar (public/client):
- Accueil (home icon) → Home screen
- Biens (building icon) → Property list
- Agences (business icon) → Agency list
- Profil (person icon) → Profile (if authenticated) or Login

Admin navigation (drawer):
For SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN_AGENCY, AGENT roles — replace bottom nav with:
- Bottom nav: Tableau de bord, Biens, Contrats, Plus
- 'Plus' opens a drawer with: Personnes, Utilisateurs, Agences, Références, Profil, Déconnexion

Role-adaptive behavior:
- Unauthenticated: public bottom nav (4 tabs)
- CLIENT: public nav + Profil tab shows client dashboard
- ADMIN/AGENT: admin bottom nav + drawer
- SUPER_ADMIN: admin nav + drawer with all management options

Shared elements:
- App bar with 'Horoazhon' title and role-specific actions
- Pull-to-refresh on all list screens
- Loading states: shimmer placeholders
- Error states: retry button with error message
- Snackbar for success/error notifications (flash messages equivalent)

Responsive:
- Tablet: consider side navigation instead of bottom nav (if screen width > 768)
- Phone: bottom navigation bar with drawer for overflow

features.title: User profile screen
features.description:
Profile management screen for authenticated users.

Screen:
- User info card: nom, prenom, email, role badge, agency name (if applicable)
- GET /api/auth/me for current user data

Sections:
- Informations personnelles: read-only display of user info
- Changer le mot de passe: expandable section with:
  - Current password field
  - New password field
  - Confirm new password field
  - 'Modifier' button
  - POST /api/auth/change-password
- Déconnexion button (with confirmation dialog)

Access: Authenticated users only (all roles).

Edge cases:
- Wrong current password: show error 'Mot de passe actuel incorrect'
- Password mismatch: client-side validation
- Success: show snackbar 'Mot de passe modifié avec succès'

features.title: Client dashboard
features.description:
Dashboard screen for CLIENT role users.

Screen:
- GET /api/client/dashboard for aggregated data
- Welcome header: 'Bonjour, {prenom}'

Stat cards (horizontal scrollable):
- Total biens
- Total contrats
- Contrats actifs
- Revenus totaux

Sections:
- Mes biens récents: list from dashboard.properties, tap → property detail
- Mes contrats récents: list from dashboard.recentContracts, tap → contract detail (read-only)

Additional tabs/screens:
- GET /api/client/biens (paginated) — full property list for client
- GET /api/client/contrats (paginated) — full contract list for client

Access: CLIENT role only.
Pull-to-refresh on all sections.
Empty states: 'Aucun bien' / 'Aucun contrat' with appropriate messaging.

features.title: Admin dashboard screen
features.description:
Dashboard screen for admin roles (SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN_AGENCY, AGENT).

Screen:
- Welcome header with role badge
- Stat cards grid (2x2):
  - Total biens (from GET /api/biens count)
  - Total contrats (from GET /api/contrats count)
  - Total personnes (from GET /api/personnes count)
  - Total agences (SUPER_ADMIN only, from GET /api/agences count)

Quick actions:
- 'Nouveau bien' → property create screen
- 'Nouveau contrat' → contract create screen
- 'Nouvelle personne' → person create screen

Recent activity:
- Recent properties list (last 5)
- Recent contracts list (last 5)

Access: SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN_AGENCY, AGENT.
Data scoped by agency for non-SUPER_ADMIN (backend handles this automatically).
Pull-to-refresh.

features.title: Admin property screens (list, create, edit)
features.description:
Property CRUD screens for admin users.

Screen 1 — Property list:
- GET /api/biens with pagination (infinite scroll)
- Search/filter bar: ville, type, price range
- Property cards with action menu (edit, delete)
- FAB (floating action button): '+' to create new property
- Pull-to-refresh
- Empty state: 'Aucun bien trouvé'

Screen 2 — Create property:
- Form fields: rue, ville, codePostal, type (dropdown), superficie, ecoScore, description
- Agency dropdown (SUPER_ADMIN only — others auto-assigned)
- POST /api/biens
- On success: navigate to edit screen for sub-resource management

Screen 3 — Edit property (tabbed):
- Tab 1 — Informations: edit basic fields (PUT /api/biens/{id})
- Tab 2 — Vente: manage Achat listing (create/edit/delete via /api/achats)
- Tab 3 — Location: manage Location listing (create/edit/delete via /api/locations)
- Tab 4 — Caractéristiques: add/remove from reference list (POST/DELETE /api/biens/{id}/caracteristiques)
- Tab 5 — Proximité: add/remove lieux (POST/DELETE /api/biens/{id}/lieux)
- Tab 6 — Propriétaire: assign/remove owner (PUT/DELETE /api/biens/{id}/proprietaire)
- Tab 7 — Photos: view/add/remove photos (POST/DELETE /api/biens/{id}/photos)

Delete:
- Confirmation dialog: 'Supprimer ce bien ?'
- DELETE /api/biens/{id}
- Error if active contracts exist

Access: SUPER_ADMIN (all), ADMIN_AGENCY/AGENT (own agency only).
Form validation: required fields highlighted on submit.

features.title: Admin agency screens (list, create, edit, settings)
features.description:
Agency management screens.

Screen 1 — Agency list (SUPER_ADMIN only):
- GET /api/agences
- Agency cards: logo, nom, ville, SIRET
- FAB: '+' to create new agency
- Tap → edit agency

Screen 2 — Create agency (SUPER_ADMIN only):
- Form fields: nom, siret, numeroTva, rue, ville, codePostal, telephone, email, description, logo URL
- POST /api/agences
- On success: navigate back to list

Screen 3 — Edit agency:
- PUT /api/agences/{id}
- Same form fields as create, pre-filled
- SUPER_ADMIN: edit any agency
- ADMIN_AGENCY: edit own agency only (settings screen)

Screen 4 — Agency settings (ADMIN_AGENCY):
- Simplified edit view for own agency
- Shows agency info + edit capability
- Accessed from drawer menu

Delete (SUPER_ADMIN only):
- Confirmation dialog
- DELETE /api/agences/{id}

Access:
- SUPER_ADMIN: full CRUD on all agencies
- ADMIN_AGENCY: edit own agency only (via settings)
- AGENT: view own agency settings (read-only)

features.title: Admin contract screens (list, create, detail)
features.description:
Contract management screens.

Screen 1 — Contract list:
- GET /api/contrats with pagination
- Filter: statut dropdown (EN_COURS, SIGNE, ANNULE, TERMINE), type (LOCATION, ACHAT)
- Contract cards: CTR-{id}, type badge, status badge, bien info, cosigners summary
- FAB: '+' to create new contract
- Pull-to-refresh

Screen 2 — Create contract:
- Step 1: Select type (Location or Achat)
- Step 2: Select the listing (location or achat from dropdowns)
- Step 3: Add cosigners — search personnes (GET /api/personnes/search), assign type_signataire (BUYER/SELLER/RENTER/OWNER)
- POST /api/contrats with locationId/achatId + cosigners array
- On success: navigate to contract detail

Screen 3 — Contract detail:
- GET /api/contrats/{id}
- Header: CTR-{id}, status badge, type badge
- Property info section (linked bien)
- Listing details (location or achat terms)
- Cosigners list with roles
- Actions (based on status):
  - EN_COURS: 'Confirmer' (POST /confirm), 'Annuler' (POST /cancel)
  - SIGNE: view PDF, upload signed document
  - ANNULE/TERMINE: read-only
- PDF download: GET /api/contrats/{id}/pdf → open in external viewer
- Signed document: upload (POST), download (GET), delete (DELETE) /api/contrats/{id}/document-signe

Access: SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN_AGENCY, AGENT (scoped to own agency by backend).

features.title: Admin person screens (list, create, edit)
features.description:
People management screens.

Screen 1 — Person list:
- GET /api/personnes with pagination
- Search bar: real-time search via GET /api/personnes/search?query=xxx
- Person cards: nom, prenom, ville, account status indicator
- FAB: '+' to create new person
- Pull-to-refresh

Screen 2 — Create person:
- Form fields: nom, prenom, dateNais (date picker), rue, ville, codePostal, rib
- POST /api/personnes
- On success: navigate to person detail/edit

Screen 3 — Edit person:
- PUT /api/personnes/{id}
- Same form fields, pre-filled
- Additional sections:
  - Account status: GET /api/personnes/{id}/account-status
  - Invite client: button to POST /api/auth/invite-client (if no account)
  - Linked biens: GET /api/personnes/{id}/biens
  - Linked contrats: GET /api/personnes/{id}/contrats

Delete:
- Confirmation dialog
- DELETE /api/personnes/{id}
- Error if person has active contracts

Access: SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN_AGENCY, AGENT.
Personne list scoped by agency for non-SUPER_ADMIN.
Search is global (allows cross-agency lookup for contract creation).

features.title: Admin user management screens
features.description:
User account management screens.

Screen 1 — User list:
- GET /api/users with pagination
- User cards: email, role badge, agency name, active/inactive status
- FAB: '+' to create new user
- Pull-to-refresh

Screen 2 — Create user:
- Form fields: email, role (dropdown: AGENT, ADMIN_AGENCY, SUPER_ADMIN based on current user role), agenceId (dropdown, SUPER_ADMIN only), personneId (search/select personne)
- POST /api/users
- On success: show confirmation (activation email sent)

Actions on existing users:
- Deactivate: DELETE /api/users/{id} with confirmation dialog
- Reactivate: PUT /api/users/{id}/reactivate with confirmation
- Status shown as badge (Actif/Inactif)

Access:
- SUPER_ADMIN: manage all users, all roles, all agencies
- ADMIN_AGENCY: manage users in own agency only, can only create AGENT role

Edge cases:
- Cannot deactivate yourself
- Email must be unique (backend validates)

features.title: Admin reference data screen
features.description:
Reference data management screen (SUPER_ADMIN only).

Screen — two-section layout:

Section 1 — Caractéristiques:
- GET /api/caracteristiques (list all)
- List items with lib name
- Add: text field + 'Ajouter' button → POST /api/caracteristiques
- Edit: inline edit or edit dialog → PUT /api/caracteristiques/{id}
- Delete: swipe-to-delete or delete button → DELETE /api/caracteristiques/{id}

Section 2 — Lieux:
- GET /api/lieux (list all)
- Same pattern: list, add, edit, delete
- POST/PUT/DELETE /api/lieux/{id}

Access: SUPER_ADMIN only.
Other admin roles can view reference data (used in property forms) but cannot modify.

Edge cases:
- Delete referenced item: backend may reject if in use by properties
- Empty lists: 'Aucune caractéristique' / 'Aucun lieu' with add prompt
